name: Media Word Filter
description: Media Word Filter companion for Jellyfin. Dashboard config, mute/profile proxy, and safe jellyfin-web client inject via File Transformation.
overview: Details-page profile/filter UI, mute loop, and /MediaWordFilter proxy. Requires File Transformation for web UI inject.
changelog: Fix playback mute: sticky item id, PlaybackManager resolution, and video.src fallback (matches JMS).
